title: Modonome Hardened Registry
description: PR-governed registry of independently-verified AgentProof conformance runs (ADR-042). Each entry names one publicly-inspectable, signed conformance run submitted via reviewed pull request. There is no service behind this file: it is a plain committed artifact, validated by scripts/check-agentproof-registry.mjs.

repo.description: The repository that ran AgentProof, e.g. "owner/name".

run_url.description: A public, independently-inspectable URL for the signed run (e.g. a CI run page or a Sigstore/Rekor entry).

digest.description: The commit or artifact digest the signed run attests to.

verified_at.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) the entry was reviewed and merged.
